Entries.Satoru_Forest: Hello, @! I'm just out here training for a bit.$9#Training is my way of preparing for whatever comes my way. Can't afford to be caught off guard.$9
Entries.Spouse_Satoru_Forest: Hello, @! I'll be out here training for a bit longer.$9#I'll see you at home later, sweetheart.$7

Entries.Satoru_Room_001: Maybe I should play with him someday.
Entries.Satoru_Room_002: "In the shadows of the night, where mortals fear to tread, lies the realm of the unseen. Seek not to gaze upon it unless you are prepared to face its mysteries."
Entries.Satoru_Room_003: You browse through Satoru's book collection, finding a diverse array of titles.#There are volumes on Eastern philosophy, martial arts, occult studies, literary classics, and historical texts.#His shelves are a testament to his broad range of interests and depth of knowledge.

Entries.winter_17.000: I wonder what kind of unusual wares the market has this year.$0
Entries.marriage_winter_17.000: Looking for something nice to take home from the market, gorgeous?$7
Entries.DesertFestival_Satoru_y1: The smells from this tent are making my stomach grumble...$0#Maybe I should order something.$0
Entries.DesertFestival_Satoru_marriage: Something smells divine...$0#Oh, hello @! Have you ordered anything to eat yet?$6
Entries.DesertFestival_Satoru_y2: Me, run a stall? Nah, I'll let the others have their fun.$0
Entries.DesertFestival_Satoru_marriage_y2: I hear the other residents are selling some unique items. Let me know if you find anything interesting!$7
